nodes.context: Independent street gang based in Soho, London, during the interwar years, involved in control of gambling clubs and racetracks.
Criminal group led by Charles 'Darby' Sabini, fought against West End gangs over control of gambling clubs.

edges.evidence_quote: They were one of several West End gangs which fought against Charles "Darby" Sabini and the "Italian Mob", specifically over control of gambling clubs or "spielers".
edges.context: The Hoxton Gang fought against the Italian Mob over control of gambling clubs.
